description: A panoramic photograph captures a coastal city nestled around a large bay or estuary, with forested hills and distant mountains forming the backdrop under a clear blue sky. The foreground shows dense urban development with numerous residential buildings, particularly on the hillsides, and a complex network of multi-lane highway interchanges. Along the waterfront, a marina with numerous small boats is visible. The bay itself is extensively used for aquaculture, with dozens of mussel rafts (batea structures) spread across the water, and a single white sailboat. Two prominent bridges are visible: one is a large cable-stayed bridge with two tall pylons spanning a narrow part of the bay in the distance, and another is a multi-arch viaduct running along the far side of the bay on the mountainous terrain. Industrial or port facilities are visible along the coastline on both sides of the bay. The lighting suggests a clear day, possibly morning or late afternoon.
